codeReview.summary: The pantry CRUD flow is largely implemented, but duplicate-name handling violates VAL-PAN-012 by allowing confusing identical entries with no distinction or explanation.

issues.description: Duplicate names are always inserted without any de-duplication or validation path. Combined with the current UI, this permits indistinguishable duplicate items and fails the contract requirement to handle duplicates gracefully.
List rows render only the ingredient name for display, so duplicates appear as confusing identical entries without explanation or clear distinction (VAL-PAN-012 explicitly disallows this outcome).

summary: Fail: feature meets most CRUD requirements but does not satisfy duplicate-handling acceptance criteria because it allows visually indistinguishable duplicate pantry items.
